metadata.title: Empirical Geometric Relationships Between Gauge Couplings, Mixing Matrices, and Cosmological Parameters
metadata.description: We present a comprehensive framework connecting Standard Model parameters to cosmological observables through geometric factors. Starting from entropy maximization S = x exp(-x²/3π), we derive Ω_Λ/Ω_m = √(3π/2) = 2.171 (0.04%). Using Z = 2√(8π/3) = 5.789, we obtain all three gauge couplings: α_em = 1/(4Z² + 3) = 1/137.04 (0.004%), α_s = Ω_Λ/Z = 0.1183 (0.3%), sin²θ_W = 1/4 - α_s/(2π) = 0.2312 (0.014%). NEW in v5: (1) Electroweak hierarchy M_Pl = 2v × Z^21.5 (0.38%), solving the hierarchy problem. (2) PMNS matrix: sin²θ₁₃ = α_em × π (4.2%), sin²θ₁₂ = 1/3 - α_em × π (1.1%), sin²θ₂₃ = 1/2 + 2α_em × π (exact). (3) CP violation: δ_CP = π + θ_W/2 = 195° (exact central value). (4) Neutrino mass ratio Δm²₃₁/Δm²₂₁ = Z (1.2%). (5) CKM: A = √(2/3) (1.2%), γ = π/3 + α_s×50° (0.1%). Framework coverage: ~70% of Standard Model + cosmological parameters.
references: Particle Data Group (2024). Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001
Hosotani et al. (2024). Sp(6) Gauge-Higgs Unification. arXiv:2411.02808
Cheng et al. (2002). SU(3) Electroweak Unification. arXiv:hep-ph/0202107
Gatto, Sartori, Tonin (1968). Phys. Lett. B 28, 128
Velten et al. (2014). Eur. Phys. J. C 74, 3160
metadata.notes: Version 5: Major expansion including hierarchy problem solution (M_Pl = 2v × Z^21.5), complete PMNS matrix derivation (tribimaximal + α_em corrections), CP violation phases for both PMNS (δ_CP = 195°) and CKM (γ = 66°), neutrino mass ratio (Δm²₃₁/Δm²₂₁ = Z), and CKM parameters (A = √(2/3)). Framework coverage now ~70% of fundamental parameters.
